_comment: Live poll data for the polling dashboard. Each country's poll rows are [pollster, fieldworkEndDate, ...values in that country's pollKeys order]. The scraper rewrites this file; the dashboard fetches it at load and falls back to the copy embedded in the HTML if this file is unavailable.

_schema.sweden: pollKeys order: V, S, MP, C, L, M, KD, SD
_schema.netherlands: pollKeys order: D66, PVV, VVD, PRO, CDA, JA21, FvD, BBB, DENK, SGP, PvdD, CU, SP, 50+, Volt

sweden.updated: Last updated: 25 May 2026 (latest poll in dataset)

netherlands.updated: Last updated: 25 May 2026 (latest poll · Ipsos) · GroenLinks–PvdA formally became Progressief Nederland (PRO) on 13 June 2026 · includes one reverse-engineered Peil/de Hond row, flagged "(est.)"

denmark.updated: Last updated: 31 May 2026 (latest poll · Voxmeter) · post-election polling; the Frederiksen III centre-left coalition took office 3 June 2026

poland.updated: Last updated: 30 April 2026 (latest poll · Opinia24) · KO leads, but the Third Way’s collapse below the threshold has cost the Tusk coalition its majority; cohabitation with PiS-backed President Nawrocki continues

italy.updated: Last updated: 16 July 2026 (latest poll · Termometro Politico)
